title: Inventory linked road-injury data sources for one LMIC city
outcome: A dated source inventory that classifies police, hospital, ambulance, death-registration, road-network, and population sources by linkage usefulness and failure mode.
inputs: WHO Global status report on road safety 2023
World Bank World Development Report 2021 road-data spotlight
one named LMIC city police or transport data source
one named LMIC city hospital, ambulance, or death-registration source
expected_artifact: datasets.md update plus evidence.json records for each accepted source.
validation_method: Domain reviewer checks each source for URL, date, controller, grain, case definition, access condition, linkage fields, subgroup coverage, and explicit limitations.
done_condition: At least five candidate sources are classified as usable, limited, or rejected, and at least one source in each of police, health-care, and denominator categories has an explicit linkage or non-linkage reason.

title: Audit de-identified police and hospital record linkage
outcome: A reproducible linkage audit reporting matches, unresolved duplicates, missingness, and subgroup coverage without exposing identifiable records.
expected_artifact: A rerunnable linkage audit and validation.md update.
validation_method: Replicator reruns the audit on a held-out de-identified sample and reconciles counts by source, period, severity, and road-user group.
done_condition: The audit reproduces the reported match and duplicate counts on a held-out sample and documents every field that was removed, transformed, or retained.

title: Test whether linked burden changes one city allocation review
outcome: A bounded sensitivity analysis showing whether alternative capture assumptions change the shortlist for one named blackspot, trauma-capacity, or enforcement review.
expected_artifact: A reproducible sensitivity analysis and outputs.md update.
validation_method: Replicator reruns the analysis under pre-specified capture assumptions and checks ranking stability, uncertainty, and non-use cases.
done_condition: The shortlist is reported as stable or unstable under at least three pre-specified capture assumptions, with no causal intervention claim.

title: Red-team privacy and equity failure modes in road-injury linkage
outcome: A review of re-identification, exclusion, surveillance, and incentive risks in linked road-injury evidence.
expected_artifact: validation.md and outputs.md safety review notes plus an independent replication record.
validation_method: Red-team reviewer attempts to identify a person, infer sensitive status, or create a harmful enforcement interpretation from the proposed artifact, then an independent reviewer replicates the failure-mode check.
done_condition: Every identified high-risk pathway has a documented mitigation or blocks publication of the affected artifact.

title: Check field use of a city road-injury evidence product
outcome: A field review naming the user, decision, timing, implementation constraint, and non-use case for one evidence product.
expected_artifact: playbooks.md update with use and non-use guidance.
validation_method: Field reviewer confirms the decision pathway and a second reviewer replicates the check that the output is not framed as an enforcement or engineering order.
done_condition: The artifact has one named user, one named decision, one time window, two explicit non-use cases, and completed red-team review before publication.
